vision.rationale: README.md describes the monorepo's purpose as 'tools for building AI agents and managing LLM deployments'. No dedicated vision document for prompt-suggester specifically — the feature is embedded within the broader pi ecosystem.

architecture.rationale: No architecture documentation was found for the prompt-suggester feature. The .pi/suggester/ directory contains runtime data (sessions, logs) but no design docs. The suggester implementation appears to live within packages/coding-agent or packages/agent source code but no explicit architecture document exists.

principles_guidelines.rationale: AGENTS.md provides comprehensive development rules covering code quality, testing, PR workflow, changelog management, and style guidelines. CONTRIBUTING.md exists for contribution guidelines.
